# 🛠️ Dotfiles  

Welcome to my dotfiles! I use this repo as a way to practice Git and document my journey of figuring out my ideal development environment. Expect constant tweaks, experiments, and occasional breakage. 😅  

## ⚡ What's in here ?  
- My Neovim config (Kickstart-based but evolving).  
- Terminal setup and scripts.  
- Other apps & customizations that make my workflow smoother.
  

![Screenshot](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/177368717/422566599-5da9172b-a0d7-495a-b65f-f4c4fdb56146.png?jwt=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NDE5MDcyMjAsIm5iZiI6MTc0MTkwNjkyMCwicGF0aCI6Ii8xNzczNjg3MTcvNDIyNTY2NTk5LTVkYTkxNzJiLWEwZDctNDk1YS1iNjVmLWY0YzRmZGI1NjE0Ni5wbmc_.3CZv9IdyVafCizZMSBlNIo-ZjWLT2BrU5e4ySJagaVk)

## 🚀 Why?  
Because finding th ideal DEV setup is an ongoing process, and this repo helps me track my progress while keeping things organized.  

## 📥 Usage  
Feel free to explore, borrow, or contribute. Just know—things might change often!
